_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Managing a data project involves understanding, planning and implementing the stages of a data project to solve a problem or design and improve a service.
reference_document_element_description: Manage the data product lifecycle, including launch, active management, deprecation, and consumer migration planning.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-009 (OP, cosine: 0.539), OP-T-007 (OP, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.589). Shared vocabulary: [data, planning]. DDaT-only terms [design, implementing, improve, involves, managing, problem] vs WIDAI-only terms [active, consumer, deprecation, launch, lifecycle, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.866, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 25-word DDaT element and 14-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.5%). "Managing a data project involves understanding, planning and implementing the st" and "Manage the data product lifecycle, including launch, active management, deprecat" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.562 ≈ STS 0.589 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, planning] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.8%. Shared tokens: [data, planning]. DDaT-only: [design, implementing, improve, involves, managing, problem]. WIDAI-only: [active, consumer, deprecation, launch, lifecycle, manage].
